response.overview: “ASOBIEXPO HAWAII 2026” will debut in Honolulu, Hawaii, featuring three major Japanese acts: Kyary Pamyu Pamyu, who helped spread “KAWAII” culture worldwide; ATARASHII GAKKO!, known for their powerful dance and youthful spirit; and idol group FRUITS ZIPPER, leaders of the “NEW KAWAII” movement. These artists will bring Japanese pop culture to Hawaii’s open-air stage for a special live performance connecting Japan and the world.
response.title: ASOBIEXPO HAWAII 2026
